race.description: Anzac Day @ Beaudesert On Sale Now Maiden Plate
race.comment: WRITTEN ACLAIM (8) peaks and led beaten 1L here before coming back and missing by 2.6L over 1200m in the QTIS JEWEL (2yo). Finds a suitable assignment and sets a decent standard for the newcomers. VINCLEY (6) debuts for Richard Laming and has looked good at the trials. The wide gate is a negative, but may have the talent to manage. MISHANI HONOUR (3) led and gave it away late at Ipswich. Will be better for that and draws low. Can stick on a lot better. MURKADO (4) debuts for Bevan Laming and has shown enough at the trials to suggest he can feature. MISS INFORMED (10) needed the debut outing at Dalby. Has trialled well since, and the winkers go on. The gate is against.
